message: Node started: Given a set of required merge operations (u, v) where u and v are siblings, determine a valid execution order. A merge is valid only if u and v are currently siblings. Since merging two siblings changes the sibling set for the parent, the order matters. Use a topological sort or a greedy approach based on tree depth (e.g., bottom-up) to ensure that when a merge (u, v) is called, u and v are indeed siblings in the evolving tree structure.
